Project TAMARAW — Term Sheet for proposed acquisition of 60% of Kalyonix Power Corporation by Viridia Holdings, Inc. (confidential; Philippines jurisdiction).
Buyer: Viridia Holdings, Inc., Philippine SEC Company Reg. No.: CS20 26-093821; principal office at Unit 1203, Viridia Tower, 5th Ave cor 34th St, North Bonifacio District, Taguig 1634, Metro Manila.
Target: Kalyonix Power Corporation (SRC reporting company), BIR TIN 245-718-903-000; registered office at Km. 28 East Service Rd., Barangay Mabolo West, Lakan City 4029, Laguna Province.
Consideration: PHP 4,800,000,000 cash at closing; price subject to working capital adjustment; completion targeted within 90 days of SEC clearance and PSE disclosure compliance.
Funding and Escrow: Alfaro Trust Bank – Fort Branch, PHP Current Acct No. 00-569-104738-2 (VIRIDIA DEAL ESCROW); SWIFT: ALTFPHM2; Branch Code: 005-FORT (test-only bank codes; no live wires).
Conditions Precedent: SEC-PH clearance; PSE disclosure alignment; either compliance with or exemption from SRC Rule 19 tender offer (as applicable); no injunction; third-party consents including lenders.
MNPI/Blackout: Parties acknowledge receipt of material non-public information; trading blackout and insider list maintenance required per SRC and PSE Listing Rules until Form 17-C is filed and public disclosure is made.
HR and Tax: No transfer of employee personnel files; only anonymized payroll tax summaries to BIR adviser for diligence; sample SSS No. 12-3456789-9 (checksum invalid; example only) must not be used for any processing.
Covenants: Ordinary course operations; no dividends without consent; no MAC termination for general economic or industry-wide conditions; anti-bribery and sanctions reps to be repeated at closing.
Disclosure: Buyer and Target to file SEC Form 17-C within three (3) PSE trading days after signing; press release coordinated through joint communications protocol and IR guidelines.
Data Room: access via https://data.viridia-holdings.ph/deal?cid=CS20 26-093821&tid=245-718-903-000 (note: spacing due to OCR); document titles may include benign product names like AuroraSwitch v2 and are not personal data.
Contacts (Buyer): Mr. Ramon Ilustre, Chief Financial Officer; mobile +63 917 555 0123; ramon.ilustre@viridia-holdings.ph; for KYC only — PH Passport No.: P 7834 219 (present t
